accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.statusBody: This application is in an early development phase. It is being developed in accordance with WCAG 2.1 Level AA and eCH-0059; a formal conformance evaluation will take place before productive use.
accessibility.feedbackBody: Please report accessibility barriers to the project maintainers via the public repository.
accessibility.preparationBody: This statement was prepared on 2026-05-28 and will be updated with each productive release.
